name: Flowborn (Marksman)

skills.name: Flow of the World
skills.description:
Channels the Flow into the body to gain Attack Speed and enhance one of four stats: Health/Attack/Movement Speed/Cooldown.
Can spend Flow to perform an enhanced Basic Attack that deals piercing physical damage.

skills.name: Convergence
skills.description: Deals physical damage to nearby enemies and knocks them back. Gains Health recovery, 5 stacks of Flow, and reduces the cooldown of Arrow of No Retreat and Arrowstorm.

skills.name: Arrow of No Retreat
skills.description: Shoots an enormous projectile at the target, dealing physical damage and knocking back non-hero units. Can dash a short distance after use.

skills.name: Arrowstorm
skills.description: Shoots multiple light projectiles at the target area, dealing physical damage and gaining Movement Speed.

skillsZh.name: 萬物為流
skillsZh.description:
將「流」引入體內獲得攻速並強化生命值/攻擊/移速/冷卻四種屬性其中一種。
消耗「流」進行強化普攻造成貫穿物理傷害。

skillsZh.name: 匯流為一
skillsZh.description: 對附近敵人造成物理傷害和擊退並獲得生命值回復和5層「流」，同時減少【破釜之箭】和【萬箭齊發】冷卻時間。

skillsZh.name: 破釜之箭
skillsZh.description: 元流之子朝指定目標發射巨型弩箭造成物理傷害並擊退非英雄單位，施放後可位移一段距離。

skillsZh.name: 萬箭齊發
skillsZh.description: 元流之子朝指定區域發射多輪輕型弩箭造成物理傷害，同時獲得加速。

tips: Build: Overlord's Might, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny.
tipsZh: 元流之子（發育路）：梯度 A，勝率 51.64%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：強者破軍、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命.

faqs.question: Is Flowborn (Marksman) good in current season?
faqs.answer: Flowborn (Marksman) is Tier A Marksman with 51.64% win rate, 0.99% pick rate, and 0.05% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Flowborn (Marksman) build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Overlord's Might, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Haste - Sunpool, Immovable - Sky Dome, Ominous Premonition.

faqs.question: How to counter Flowborn (Marksman)?
faqs.answer: Pick Kaizer, Dun, Arthur. Strong into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong.

faqsZh.question: 元流之子 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 元流之子 為 A 梯度，勝率 51.64%、選取 0.99%、禁用 0.05%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 元流之子 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：強者破軍、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、迅疾・日淵、不動・天穹、不祥徵兆.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 元流之子？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Kaizer、Dun、Arthur。元流之子 克制 Liu Bei、Athena、Zilong。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong. Weak into: Kaizer, Dun, Arthur.
metaAnalysisZh: 元流之子 勝率 51.64%（Camp HOK，2026-06-27）

guide.overview: Flowborn (Marksman) is a Medium Marksman (Farm Lane) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 51.8% win rate and 1.0% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Flowborn (Marksman): Channels the Flow into the body to gain Attack Speed and enhance one of four stats: Health/Attack/Movement Speed/Cooldown.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Boots of Dexterity, Sparkforged Dagger, Doomsday, then complete Mortal Punisher, Shadow Ripper, Eternity Blade. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Fate, Penetration for stats that match Flowborn (Marksman)'s Marksman kit. Take Flash & Execute — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Convergence → Arrow of No Retreat → Arrowstorm → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.reason: Convergence is your lane trade tool. Arrow of No Retreat second. Arrowstorm whenever available.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Convergence → Arrow of No Retreat → Arrowstorm → weave basic attacks
combos.when: Farm Lane skirmish or objective fight

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Last-hit safely until first core item. Ping jungler for river vision; never face-check brush without minion cover.
guide.teamfight: Position behind frontline; attack closest safe target. Join fight only after enemy dive cooldowns are used.
guide.highRank: Flowborn (Marksman) is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 51.8% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick. Pick rate 1.0% — frequently seen in ranked; learn the matchup even if you do not main Flowborn (Marksman).
comparisons: Flowborn (Marksman) vs Hou Yi (Marksman, Tier S+): Hou Yi is 2.9% pick / 49.3% WR. Flowborn (Marksman) has +2.5% WR vs Hou Yi in Camp data. Choose Flowborn (Marksman) when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Hou Yi for Farm Lane comfort.

Flowborn (Marksman) vs Marco Polo (Marksman, Tier S+): Marco Polo is 2.1% pick / 50.1% WR. Flowborn (Marksman) has +1.7% WR vs Marco Polo in Camp data. Choose Flowborn (Marksman) when you need Farm Lane identity; choose Marco Polo for Farm Lane comfort.

matchups.summary: Flowborn (Marksman) excels into Liu Bei, Athena, Zilong. Avoid blind picking into Kaizer, Dun, Arthur without team peel.
